summary: Completed testing of Import/Export integration into UsersClassesManagement page. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when no schedule data exists (expected behavior)

issues: Chart width/height warnings in console - charts may not render properly when sidebar is collapsed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Import/Export functionality has been successfully integrated into UsersClassesManagement page. Key verifications: 1) Import/Export tab (استيراد/تصدير) visible in UsersClassesManagement page with data-testid='filter-import-export' 2) Import section has data type selection (students/teachers), template download, file upload, start import button 3) Export section has 5 export types (students, teachers, schedule, attendance, grades), format selection (xlsx/csv), export button 4) /admin/bulk route correctly redirects to home page 5) Platform admin sidebar no longer has standalone Import/Export link

import_export_tab_visible.evidence: Tab with data-testid='filter-import-export' found and clickable in UsersClassesManagement page

import_section_ui.evidence: Inner Import tab, data type buttons (students/teachers), download template button, file upload input, start import button all present

export_section_ui.evidence: Inner Export tab, 5 export type buttons (students, teachers, schedule, attendance, grades), format selector, export data button all present

admin_bulk_route_removed.evidence: Navigating to /admin/bulk redirects to home page (https://edu-planner-19.preview.emergentagent.com/)

sidebar_import_export_link_removed.evidence: Platform admin sidebar has 10 links, none containing 'bulk' or standalone import/export

api_auth_required.evidence: All bulk endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)
